overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring the protagonist Geralt standing on a stone bridge over a vibrant turquoise stream in a lush summer forest. The character surveys the scenic landscape including a distant castle across the water, then proceeds to walk along a winding dirt path deeper into the dense woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge over turquoise stream with panoramic forest views

events.description: character stops rotating and stands still to observe the distant castle across the stream

agents.ego_description: standing on the stone bridge, initially rotating to survey the surroundings then gazing at the turquoise stream and distant castle

entered.detail: cobblestone bridge with weathered stone blocks and wooden railings spanning the stream
vibrant blue-green water flowing through rocky banks below the bridge
stone tower and castle visible across the lake in the background
tall deciduous trees with dense green foliage surrounding the stream
simple wooden fence along the sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt standing on a stone bridge in a sunlit forest. The camera rotates around the character, revealing a stunning view of a turquoise stream flowing toward a distant castle. The character stops moving to take in the scenic vista, with lush green trees and wildflowers surrounding the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail along stream bank

events.description: character steps off the stone bridge onto the dirt path, entering the denser forest area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path away from the bridge, moving deeper into the wooded area with swords visible on his back

entered.detail: narrow winding trail of packed earth cutting through tall grass and vegetation
tall grasses, ferns, and wildflowers lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the bridge and steps onto a dirt trail winding through dense forest. The path runs alongside the turquoise stream, which now appears to the right, while the surrounding vegetation grows thicker and closer. The camera follows Geralt from behind as he walks deeper into the woodland, with the castle still visible in the distant background through the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a wide, scenic vista on a stone bridge and transitions into a focused journey through a dense woodland. It begins by rotating around Geralt as he stands atop the bridge, revealing a vibrant turquoise stream that flows toward a distant castle amidst lush green trees and wildflowers. As the character leaves the bridge, the camera shifts to follow him from behind, tracking his movement onto a winding dirt trail. The scene then narrows as the surrounding vegetation grows thicker and the stream moves to the right, while the castle remains a distant landmark glimpsed through the canopy. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the woodland, immersing the viewer in the dense foliage of the summer forest.
